question: What is the operating temperature range of the Acme R1?

messages.content: What is the operating temperature range of the Acme R1?

args.query: Acme R1 operating temperature range specifications

content.title: Acme Robotics R1 — US Customer Datasheet

messages.name: fetch_url
messages.content: Operating temperature range: 32 to 104 (a common question: some US datasheet printings list this range without an explicit unit; it refers to degrees Fahrenheit)

args.answer: The Acme R1 operates between **0 to 40 degrees Celsius** (32 to 104 degrees Fahrenheit). Note: two corpus sources present this range differently — the metric datasheet gives 0–40°C; the US imperial datasheet lists 32–104 without an explicit unit label (which refers to Fahrenheit).

final_answer: The Acme R1 operates between **0 to 40 degrees Celsius** (32 to 104 degrees Fahrenheit). Note: two corpus sources present this range differently — the metric datasheet gives 0–40°C; the US imperial datasheet lists 32–104 without an explicit unit label (which refers to Fahrenheit).
